query:
SELECT rp.id, rp.first_name, rp.last_name, rp.email, rp.pipeline_stage, rp.application_submitted_at,
       rp.created_at
FROM recruitment_prospects rp
WHERE rp.email = 'tripialist@gmail.com';

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.email, a.status, a.created_at
FROM agents a
WHERE a.email = 'tripialist@gmail.com';

SELECT res.email_key, res.subject, res.sent_at
FROM recruitment_emails_sent res
JOIN recruitment_prospects rp ON rp.id = res.prospect_id
WHERE rp.email = 'tripialist@gmail.com'
ORDER BY res.sent_at DESC;
